fields.label: Enable Receipt OCR
fields.description: When off, the petty-cash receipt scanner returns empty defaults and the user fills the form manually.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Haiku is fast and cheap, recommended for receipt OCR. Switch to Sonnet only if you see consistent extraction errors.

fields.label: Anthropic API Key
fields.description: Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys . Stored encrypted at rest.

fields.label: Monthly call cap (soft)
fields.description: Soft guardrail. When exceeded in a calendar month the server logs an Error Log entry and OCR returns empty defaults until reset. Set 0 to disable.

fields.label: Default VAT Account
fields.description: When set, every petty-cash submission auto-populates Expense Claim → Taxes & Charges with the VAT portion of any row marked tax-invoice / VAT-included. Leave blank to skip auto-tax (engineers can add taxes manually in ERPNext).

fields.label: Default VAT description
fields.description: Shown in the Taxes & Charges row description column.

fields.label: Create ERPNext Attendance
fields.description: When on, each finalized day (Present once approved, or Absent) also creates + submits a standard ERPNext Attendance record so it appears in HR → Attendance and feeds payroll. ESS Daily Attendance always keeps the richer project-split / overtime view. Turn off if your site already marks Attendance via shifts.

fields.label: Default site radius (m)
fields.description: Used when a Project has site coordinates set but no explicit radius.

fields.label: Data Retention
fields.description: Housekeeping for TRANSIENT data only. Attendance, check-ins and the approval trail are payroll/compliance records and are NEVER auto-deleted.

fields.label: Enable automatic retention purge
fields.description: Off by default. When on, a monthly job purges old read notifications and stale (disabled) push subscriptions only. Run akg_ess.retention.retention_report first to preview what would be removed.

fields.label: Notification retention (days)
fields.description: READ notifications older than this are purged. Unread notifications are always kept. 0 = keep forever.

fields.label: Stale push subscription (days)
fields.description: DISABLED push subscriptions untouched for this long are purged. Active subscriptions are always kept. 0 = keep forever.
